Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface ILinkedItemHandler

  • public interface ILinkedItemHandler
    Handles registration and retrieval of linked items. Linked items are custom item definitions that can be updated globally.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void add​(ILinkedItem linkedItem)
      Registers a linked item with this handler.
      boolean contains​(int id)
      Checks whether a linked item with the given ID exists.
      boolean contains​(ILinkedItem linkedItem)
      Checks whether the given linked item is registered.
      ILinkedItem createItem​(String name)
      Creates a new linked item with the given name.
      IItemStack createItemStack​(int id)
      Creates an ItemStack from a linked item by its ID.
      ILinkedItem get​(int id)
      Returns the linked item with the given ID.
      ILinkedItem remove​(int id)
      Removes and returns the linked item with the given ID.

    • Method Detail

      • createItem

        ILinkedItem createItem​(String name)
        Creates a new linked item with the given name.
        Parameters:
        name - the item name.
        Returns:
        the created linked item.

      • createItemStack

        IItemStack createItemStack​(int id)
        Creates an ItemStack from a linked item by its ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the linked item ID.
        Returns:
        the item stack, or null if the ID is invalid.

      • add

        void add​(ILinkedItem linkedItem)
        Registers a linked item with this handler.
        Parameters:
        linkedItem - the linked item to add.

      • remove

        ILinkedItem remove​(int id)
        Removes and returns the linked item with the given ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the linked item ID.
        Returns:
        the removed linked item, or null if not found.

      • get

        ILinkedItem get​(int id)
        Returns the linked item with the given ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the linked item ID.
        Returns:
        the linked item, or null if not found.

      • contains

        boolean contains​(int id)
        Checks whether a linked item with the given ID exists.
        Parameters:
        id - the linked item ID.
        Returns:
        true if it exists; false otherwise.

      • contains

        boolean contains​(ILinkedItem linkedItem)
        Checks whether the given linked item is registered.
        Parameters:
        linkedItem - the linked item to check.
        Returns:
        true if it exists; false otherwise.
